headline: What To Expect From Leidos’s (LDOS) Q1 Earnings
summary: Defense contractor Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) will be announcing earnings results this Tuesday before market hours. Here’s what to look for.

headline: Leidos Holdings, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
summary: RESTON, Va. - Leidos Holdings, Inc. announced today that its board of directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.43 per outstanding share of the company's common stock. The cash dividend...
